SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-19-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-19-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED.
